channel.title: laura biagiotti on Dsconti per te!

item.title: Laura Biagiotti Romamor For Men 2 5 oz EDT Spray
item.description: Laura Biagiotti Romamor For Men 2 5 oz EDT Spray qui: ℹ️: Keeps you refreshing all day. This amber woody fragrance has a blend of cardamom, grapefruit, black pepper, vetiver, zinger, cedar, fig, lavender, nutmeg, tonka bean, sandalwood, amber, musk and incense Launched by the design house of laura biagiotti in the year 2018 🛒 Acquista qui!! Check the price of this item in other countries: 🇬🇧 United Kingdom | 🇺🇸 USA | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇪🇸 Spain | 🇫🇷 France | 🇮🇹 Italia | 🇦🇪 Arab Emirates | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇧🇪 Belgium | 🇳🇱 Neederlands | 🇵🇱 Poland | 🇸🇪 Sweden |
